car.new:
Car Insurance pitch (Naya Customer):

"Bhaiya, gadi toh le li ГғВғГӮВўГғВӮГӮВҖГғВӮГӮВ” lekin ek accident mein sab kuch jaata hai. MMFSL car insurance mein zero depreciation cover, cashless repair, 24/7 claim support."

"Loan bhi hamare paas, insurance bhi hamare paas ГғВғГӮВўГғВӮГӮВҖГғВӮГӮВ” ek hi jagah sab."

Close: "RC do ГғВғГӮВўГғВӮГӮВҖГғВӮГӮВ” 10 minute mein cover ho jaata hai."
car.existing:
Car Insurance pitch (Existing Customer)

Namaste sirвҖҰ Mahindra Finance se bol raha hoonвҖҰ ek baat poochu?

Last 1 saal me gaadi chalate hue kabhi aisa laga ki вҖҳagar kabhi kuch ho gaya toh headache ho jayegaвҖҷ?вҖқ

(Pause. Let them think. This is your hook.)

вҖңMain isliye pooch raha hoon sirвҖҰ kyunki jab tak claim nahi aata na, insurance bas ek paper lagta hai.


Hum chahte hai aapke sath kabhi aisa na ho par kisi chiz ka bharosa nai hota and kabhi kuch ho jaata hai to

Us samay aapka tension kam karne k liye hum hai, us samay srf aapka hi nai saamne wale ka bhi aapko dekhna padta hai and tabhi kise call karu kaise hoga ye sab aapko na sochna pade usliye mahindra finance deta hai aapka sath

Kyuki jab accident hota hai tab hum kuch sochne ki avastha me nai hote tab jo cheeze matter karti hai wo hai:

Kaise hoga sab and kon madat karega 

Last policy me aapko ye guarantee mili tha kya?вҖқ

(YouвҖҷre now making them evaluate, not you pitching.)

Mahindra 75 saal purani hai agar mai nai rahunga to yaha koi aur hoga jo aapki madat karega par kahi aur se karvayenge to us samay koi aapki madat nai karega

вҖңIs baar main aapko jo suggest kar raha hoon na sir вҖ” wo sirf renewal nahi haiвҖҰ
main aapka risk thoda aur cover kar raha hoon:
	вҖў	Zero dep вҶ’ parts ka paisa aapke pocket se nahi
	вҖў	Engine cover вҶ’ flooding ya damage me bada kharcha bachta hai

Matlab simple hai sir вҖ” chhota premium difference, bada tension difference.вҖқ

рҹ‘ү Close (soft, respectful):

вҖңAap boliye sirвҖҰ aap safe rehna chahte ho ya thode se difference k wjhse us time ka tension abhi se rakhna chahte ho

fd.new:
Fixed Deposit pitch (Naya Customer):

"Bank se zyada return chahiye? MMFSL mein CRISIL/ICRA AAA rated FD lo ГғВғГӮВўГғВӮГӮВҖГғВӮГӮВ” 7.35% tak."

Samruddhi: regular monthly interest
Dhanvruddhi: cumulative ГғВғГӮВўГғВӮГӮВҖГғВӮГӮВ” zyada return

Rs.5,000 se shuru, senior citizens +0.35%.

objections.rate:
Rate/Byaj Zyada Hai:

Reframe karo: "Bhaiya, rate se zyada faida dekho."

Hisaab dikhao:
- Tractor EMI = Rs.11,000/month
- Apna tractor hone se fasal = Rs.2-3 lakh zyada
- EMI ek hafte mein nikal aayi!

Phir poochho: "Kaunsi bank ne kam rate diya? Batao ГғВғГӮВўГғВӮГӮВҖГғВӮГӮВ” MMFSL negotiate bhi karta hai."

Kabhi defend mat karo ГғВғГӮВўГғВӮГӮВҖГғВӮГӮВ” return dikhao.
objections.trust:
"Yeh wahi Mahindra hai jiska tractor aapke khet mein chal raha hai ГғВғГӮВўГғВӮГӮВҖГғВӮГӮВ” 32 saal purani, NSE/BSE listed, RBI registered, 1 crore+ customers."

Local proof: "Aapke gaon mein bhi customers hain ГғВғГӮВўГғВӮГӮВҖГғВӮГӮВ” unse pooch lo."

Mahindra naam hi trust hai.
objections.budget:
"Isliye toh MMFSL hai ГғВғГӮВўГғВӮГӮВҖГғВӮГӮВ” aaj ek paisa nahi chahiye. Sirf kagaz do, 2 din mein loan pass."

EMI choti karo: 5 saal = Rs.5,000-6,000/month
Harvest EMI: pehle 6 mahine ZERO!

"Abhi paisa nahi" = "abhi loan lo" ГғВғГӮВўГғВӮГӮВҖГғВӮГӮВ” yeh unhe samjhao.
objections.delay:
Urgency banao: "Bilkul sochiye bhaiya. Bas ГғВғГӮВўГғВӮГӮВҖГғВӮГӮВ” yeh scheme [date] tak hai, baad mein EMI zyada."

Appointment fix karo: "Kal subah 10 baje ya shaam 5 baje?" ГғВғГӮВўГғВӮГӮВҖГғВӮГӮВ” do options do. Aaj hi confirm karo.
objections.bank:
Bank vs MMFSL:
- Bank mein ITR chahiye ГғВғГӮВўГғВӮГӮВҖГғВӮГӮВ” MMFSL mein zameen ke kagaz
- Bank ke chakkar ГғВғГӮВўГғВӮГӮВҖГғВӮГӮВ” MMFSL ghar aata hai
- Bank 2-3 hafte ГғВғГӮВўГғВӮГӮВҖГғВӮГӮВ” MMFSL 2 working days
- Bank rural nahi ГғВғГӮВўГғВӮГӮВҖГғВӮГӮВ” MMFSL 4 lakh+ gaon

"Bank ne kitne chakkar lagwaye? MMFSL mein ek baar aao ГғВғГӮВўГғВӮГӮВҖГғВӮГӮВ” ghar baith ke ho jaayega."
objections.other:
Reluctant Customer:

1. Problem sunno: "Aaj bina tractor ke kya takleef hai?" ГғВғГӮВўГғВӮГӮВҖГғВӮГӮВ” sunne do.
2. Numbers dikhao: "Apna tractor = Rs.X kiraya bachega + Rs.Y fasal zyada"
3. Easy step: "Sirf Aadhaar lao aaj ГғВғГӮВўГғВӮГӮВҖГғВӮГӮВ” koi aur kuch nahi."

Simplicity = conversion.
